insurer_name: Aditya Birla Health Insurance Co. Ltd.

inpatient_hospitalization.notes: Includes room rent, ICU charges, operation theatre expenses, medical practitioner fees, medicines, and diagnostic tests.

day_care_treatments.limit_text: Medical treatment and/or surgical procedure under General or Local Anaesthesia in a Hospital/Day Care Centre in less than 24 hrs

domiciliary_treatment.limit_text: Medical treatment for an illness/disease/injury which in the normal course would require care and treatment at a Hospital but is actually taken while confined at home

ayush_coverage.limit_text: Medical Expenses for medically required AYUSH Treatments undergone as an In-patient Treatment or Day Care Treatment
ayush_coverage.notes: Comfort treatment involving steam bath/sauna/oil massages are excluded.

maternity_coverage.limit_text: Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth (including complicated deliveries and caesarean sections incurred during hospitalization); expenses towards lawful medical termination of pregnancy during the policy period.

newborn_coverage.limit_text: Baby born during the Policy Period and is Aged upto 90 days

critical_illness_cover.limit_text: Cover for specified critical illnesses like Cancer, Myocardial Infarction, Stroke, etc.
critical_illness_cover.notes: Detailed definitions of each critical illness are provided in the policy document.

notable_exclusions_summary: Exclusions include cosmetic surgery, self-inflicted injury, war, non-medical expenses, and experimental treatments. Pre-existing diseases are covered after 36 months.
claim_process_summary: Claims must be made in accordance with the procedure set out in the policy document. Cashless facility is available at Network Providers.
